title: fix: capabilities table column alignment in docs
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Table manners
gist.blurb: We fixed a quirky markdown table in our API docs where emojis were pushing everything out of alignment. Everything is perfectly straight and readable again.
gist.summary: Fixed a markdown table alignment issue in the API documentation by merging the emoji and capability columns.
gist.impact: Developers reading the API docs will now see a correctly aligned capabilities table.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing blocks or straightening a crooked table. Nomnom creature eating the extra column block.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, carefully straightening a stack of glowing document blocks on a desk. The round Nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating a stray pixelated block. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
